title: Imperial Stylish Red Wine Glasses 220 ml Series 'Vintage' Set of 6 Wine Glasses Made of Crystalline Glass Dishwasher Safe
features: Details: W/H: 8.7 cm x 18.1 cm, diameter: 8.4 cm, total volume: 220 ml, recommended filling: 150 ml, weight: 228 g, colour: transparent, clear, material: crystalline glass, soundful, light, stable, 6 pieces, series: vintage
Use: the red wine goblets are ideal for red wines or other of your favourite drinks and wines. The red wine glasses are dishwasher safe, which allows you to clean effortlessly.

Features: the red wine goblet has high-quality glass. The Crystalline glass shows high quality, durability, and resistance and shows beautiful light scattering. The glasses have a great sound and are very light thanks to the crystal glass.

Design: The red wine glass has been designed in an elegant vintage style. The glass has a beautiful crystal handle and can be held comfortably in the hand. The glass rim is slightly curved and allows for a nice drinking experience. Our glassware is made in the EU.

PERFECT GIFT IDEA Our red wine glasses combine sophisticated design with functionality and quality, making them the ideal gift for all wine lovers. The red wine glass is perfect for everyday use as well as for special occasions or themed parties.
description: High quality and stylish vintage style wine glasses for unforgettable moments! Our elegant wine glass for an unforgettable and special wine experience. Details: Width: 8.7 cm. Height: 18.1 cm. Diameter: 8.4 cm. Total volume: 220 ml. Filling recommendation: 150 ml. Weight: 228g (per glass) Colour: transparent, clear. Material: crystalline glass. Crystalline glass has the highest quality and has a wonderfully light diffusing. It is durable and resistant to mechanical damage. The glasses have a great sound and are very light thanks to the crystal glass. The crystalline glass is ideal for everyday use as well as for - Special occasions. - Wine tasting - Balls or other stylish events and moments of enjoyment. The optimal size and shape of our crystalline glasses allow the wine to develop its full aroma, so that every drop can be enjoyed to the fullest. The thin glass maintains the wine temperature in the glass better than thicker glass. Our red wine glasses from the 'Vintage' series are the perfect addition to your wine glass collection and let you experience the full taste of your favourite red wine. The box contents include 6 goblets, which are dishwasher safe. (The decoration shown in the photos is not included.) If you have any questions, please contact us, we will be happy to advise you and look forward to hearing from you.
